subcodes.title: Words spoken in Oct. 1912 in New York
subcodes.first_line: Between 1860 and 1865 you did a wonderful thing; you knocked the shackles from chattel slavery; but today you must do a much more wonderful thing: you must destroy industrial slavery.
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @race unity; racial issues, @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving
